name: matrix-onboarding
description: Run development work on your Matrix cloud computer

interface.shortDescription: Run development work on your Matrix cloud computer
interface.longDescription: Set up and recover your Matrix cloud computer, run commands and coding-agent tasks, and safely clone or update GitHub projects without moving local credentials.
defaultPrompt: Build a new app on my Matrix computer.
Clone this GitHub repo on Matrix and make a change.
Run this command on my Matrix computer.
